title: [codereview-P2] advance_to calls may not process all RX in BARRIER_SYNC mode
description: The 5 advance_to( +1s ) calls in conference test may not be sufficient or correct for BARRIER_SYNC TimeMode. Reference simulation.py for proper barrier sync usage in scale tests. May need sim.step() or full event processing loop. test_scale.py:372
close_reason: Replaced fixed advance_to loop with maybe_advance_time() barrier-aware loop per simulation.py. Verified in 3 passes.
